statement: This manuscript is an author-led preprint and has not yet undergone journal peer review.
The code, chain artifacts, validation ledgers, checksums, and reproduction commands are publicly available for reader verification in the associated GitHub repository.
Within the stated DEU full-objective likelihood configuration, the booked production chains support the reported scoped posterior summary.
The matched DEU/native comparison is reported descriptively under the same staged validation scope.

The formal and independent evidence-estimator diagnostics favor DEU over the native baseline within the internal validation protocol; this is reported as a caveated estimator result, not as peer-reviewed model superiority.
TT_lite was monitored as diagnostic context but was excluded from the sampled production and evidence likelihoods.
Do not claim that the work is peer reviewed or independently externally reviewed.
scope: No external reviewer result was booked; the old reviewer path remained pending by design.

statement: Do not state unqualified model superiority or final cosmological truth.
scope: The current route allows scoped internal/preprint evidence language with caveats, not final model-selection claims.

statement: Do not claim TT_lite was part of the sampled posterior or evidence likelihood.
scope: TT_lite remained diagnostic-only throughout the production/evidence chain.

statement: Do not use final publication-style language implying journal acceptance or settled review.
scope: The release is an author-led preprint with a public verification package.

statement: Do not equate GitHub reader verification with formal peer review.
scope: Public reproducibility access supports transparency, not reviewer certification.
